goal: Encode adversarial feedback as a first-class workflow in dod-guard — 4-phase adversarial choreography replacing primitive Contrarian Agent

steps.title: Fix Interview Skill Phase 3.6
steps.description: Rewrite interview Phase 3.6 'Contrarian Agent' → 'Adversarial Spec Review' with 5-lens structure + GO/REVISE/STOP verdicts. Remove all references to deleted predicate types (mutation, streamline, observability, performance, complexity, coverage, duplication) and deleted proof categories. Fix stale predicate type list and proof category list in Phase 4.

steps.title: Add AdversarialGate Types
steps.description: Add AdversarialGate, AdversarialLensResult, AdversarialVerdict types to types.ts. Add adversarial_gates: AdversarialGate[] to DodDocument. Add adversarial, holdout, convergence to Predicate.type union. Add test_audit to ProofCategory.

steps.title: Add AdversarialGate Proof Evaluators
steps.description: Add evalAdversarial(), evalHoldout(), evalConvergence() handlers in evaluate-proof.ts. Update PredicateSchema in schemas.ts for new predicate types.

steps.title: Add dod_adversarial_gate MCP Tool
steps.description: Register new dod_adversarial_gate tool in index.ts with Zod schema for phase + lenses. Implement gate creation (generates dispatch plan, stores results) and gate status check (reads existing gates, validates progression).

steps.title: Create /adversarial-workflow Skill
steps.description: Create new skill file at skills/adversarial-workflow/SKILL.md. Full 4-phase choreography: interview → test audit → implementation review → structural gates. Lens dispatch templates per phase, verdict computation rules, failure recovery, integration with existing skills.

steps.title: Enhance /step-by-step with Adversarial Injection
steps.description: Update step-by-step SKILL.md to inject adversarial implementation review after all steps complete (new Phase 3). Add structural gates as Phase 4. Or document that adversarial-workflow skill calls step-by-step for implementation phase — whichever design is cleaner.

steps.title: Create Structural Gate Templates
steps.description: Create standards/structural-gates.md with per-language behavioral structural proof commands (TypeScript, Python, Rust), convergence audit configuration, and anti-pattern JSON schema for postmortem capture.

steps.title: Update Marketplace & Documentation
steps.description: Add adversarial-workflow skill to dod-guard marketplace.json. Update root marketplace.json skill descriptions. Update dod-guard CLAUDE.md architecture docs with new predicate types and tool. Update README.md user-facing docs.

steps.title: Test & Publish
steps.description: Write tests for new predicate evaluators (adversarial, holdout, convergence). Write tests for AdversarialGate validation. Run full test suite. Clean build + bundle. Version bump, commit, tag, push for CI publish.
